name: claude-tdd-pro
description: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

package_manager.title: Package manager
package_manager.description: Which package manager the /pr and /init-guardrails commands should use.

test_command.title: Test command
test_command.description: Command to run the full test suite (e.g. 'npm test', 'pytest', 'go test ./...'). Used by pre-flight checks.

lint_command.title: Lint command
lint_command.description: Command to run linters (e.g. 'npm run lint', 'ruff check .'). Used by pre-flight checks.

typecheck_command.title: Typecheck command
typecheck_command.description: Type checker (e.g. 'npm run typecheck', 'mypy .'). Empty string to skip.

build_command.title: Build command
build_command.description: Production build (e.g. 'npm run build'). Empty string to skip.

default_reviewer.title: Default PR reviewer (GitHub handle)
default_reviewer.description: Optional GitHub handle to assign by default on /pr (e.g. 'octocat'). Empty = no auto-assign.

tdd_guard_default.title: TDD guard default-on in new projects
tdd_guard_default.description: TDD-Guard is now ON by default (matches Google eng-practices tests-with-change). Set this to false to revert to opt-in behavior; per-project override is .claude-tdd-pro/tdd-guard.disabled.

ai_disclosure_required.title: Require AI involvement disclosure in PRs
ai_disclosure_required.description: When true, /pr will refuse to draft a PR without an explicit 'AI involvement' section.

attribution_style.title: AI attribution trailer style
attribution_style.description: Trailer to append to commits and PR bodies. 'assisted-by' is the 2026 convention (Linux kernel, Anthropic). 'co-authored-by' is the legacy GitHub-stat-inflating convention. 'none' suppresses the trailer entirely.

rubric_severity_threshold.title: Rubric severity threshold for Stop hook
rubric_severity_threshold.description: P0-only blocks Stop on correctness/security violations only. P0+P1 also blocks on style violations. P0+P1+P2 also blocks on doc/comment gaps. Recommended: P0 for legacy elevation, P0+P1 for greenfield.
